content.en:
"Next, while cultivating the Golden Silk Ancestral Technique, we will strive to break the shackles of the Holy Armor Sacred Technique and become the Ancestral Armor Ancestral Technique!"

Ye Tian arranged the next cultivation plan.

With the defense of the Ancestral Endowment, Ye Tian was not worried that he would not be able to upgrade the Holy Armor Sacred Technique to the Ancestral Skill.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

Over the years, in addition to constantly copying the Holy Fu and killing the Holy Soul Beasts to strengthen the Soul Holy Light, Ye Tian has also been using the Holy Armor Holy Technique to fight closely with many Holy Soul Beasts and hone the Holy Armor Holy Technique.

I don't know how many times, Ye Tian's Holy Armor Holy Technique was shattered by the Holy Soul Beast, but between shattering and repairing, Ye Tian's understanding of the Holy Armor Holy Technique became deeper and deeper, and because of the defense of the Ancestral Endowment, Ye Tian had no bottleneck in the Holy Technique, as long as the opportunity arrived, he could upgrade the Holy Skill to the Ancestral Skill, which was his advantage.

this day.

When Ye Tian was fighting with a group of Holy Soul Beasts, he finally completed the transformation of the Holy Armor Holy Technique.

Airplanes!!!

A set of black-gold battle armor has banned Ye Tian's previous holy armor, this is a fundamental qualitative change in the holy technique, it is no longer a holy skill, but an ancestral skill!

Ancestral Technique: Ancestral Armor!

The power of the ancestral skill of the Ancestral Armor is very terrifying, and the defensive power is not known how many times stronger than the Holy Armor, Ye Tian stood there, and even if a large number of Holy Soul Beasts attacked him, he couldn't break his defense.

Such a defense can be described as terrifying!

The attack has the Golden Silk Ancestral Skill, and the defense has the Ancestral Armor Ancestral Skill, and Ye Tian's strength can be described as a surge.

If you have another speed type ancestral skill, it will be more comprehensive.

"Next, let's comprehensively improve the Streamer Holy Technique!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Originally, Ye Tian wanted to cultivate like this with peace of mind, anyway, he could stay in the Holy Soul Realm for a long time, and some of them had time to improve the soul holy light and cultivate the holy technique.

However, on this day, a summons came.

"The message of the herring fish domain ancestor!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

From the summons, the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate and the Supreme Domain Ancestors of other forces found a treasure land, which is a real place of great opportunity, and is currently in the midst of a battle, and will fight at any time, so the summons asked him to come over to support.

Subsequently, the other Battle Gate Supreme Domain Ancestors also sent a message to Ye Tian, asking him for support.

"What a real place of great opportunity!"

Ye Tian was a little curious about this place, but the Supreme Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate didn't say what the chance was, and he didn't ask, but rushed over as fast as he could.

-------------------

The Holy Soul Realm, in a void like a starry sky, is inside the treasure land, and a group of Supreme Domain Ancestors appear here.

Abrupt.

A black ball the size of a star appeared, which immediately caused a group of Supreme Domain Ancestors to fight.

"This Star Soul Sand is mine!"

A Supreme Domain Ancestor on the Supreme Strength List shouted.

However, the Supreme Domain Ancestor on the Supreme Strength List was nothing here, and I saw a ten-meter-tall giant pinching this Supreme Domain Ancestor on the Supreme Strength List to death with one hand.

This giant is not a cultivator, but a forbidden creature, appearing in human form.

He is the sixth strongest domain ancestor of the Forbidden Holy Gate Supreme Sect - Wu Xiu!

Wu Xiu's strength shocked the other Supreme Domain Ancestors, and instantly snatched this Star Soul Sand, and then included it in the Soul Sea, so that it would be difficult for others to snatch it.

It's not that there is no Supreme Domain Ancestor comparable to Wu Xiu here, it's just that this treasure land void is too big, and the location where Star Soul Sand appears is unpredictable, so it was snatched by Wu Xiu.

"It's a pity!"

An extremely powerful Supreme Domain Ancestor regretted it.

"Wu Xiu, you dare to kill our Immortal Holy Gate's Supreme Rank Supreme Domain Ancestor!"

A Supreme Domain Ancestor who had just arrived said angrily.

He is the seventh strongest domain ancestor on the Immortal Holy Gate Supreme Strength List, the Golden Serpent Domain Ancestor!

"Golden Snake Domain Ancestor, are you not convinced?

Wu Xiu sneered.

"Humph!"

The Golden Snake Domain Ancestor snorted coldly, but he didn't make a move.

In the case of no benefit, he fought with the Witch Cultivation Domain Ancestor, it was completely unnecessary, and if he was injured, it would prevent him from snatching the treasure.

"Cowardice!"

Wu Xiu said.

At this moment, Ye Tian also came.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, you're here!"

One of the strongest domain ancestors of the Battle Gate saw Ye Tian and greeted him.

Among them, the herring fish domain ancestor is also there, but the injury is not light, and now he is healing.

After all, the strength of the Blue Fish Domain Ancestor is not too strong, even if the strength has improved a lot over the years, it still can't compare to those top Supreme Domain Ancestors on the Supreme Strength List, so he was injured.

"What kind of treasure is this?"

Ye Tian asked.

He had just arrived, and he didn't know much about the situation, so he was curious about the situation.

"This treasure land is very special, it can give birth to Star Soul Sand!" said the Extreme Domain Ancestor Xihe Domain Ancestor, who was the thirteenth on the Battle Gate Supreme Strength List.

"Star Soul Sand !!!!"

Ye Tian had naturally heard of this treasure, it was named after sand, but in fact, its size was comparable to a small star, but in the Dark Sacred Domain, it was actually a grain of sand, but it was a treasure that could strengthen the soul holy light.

The value of a Star Soul Sand was even more precious than the Soul Saint Realm Flower, so one Star Soul Sand was enough for a Supreme Domain Ancestor to cultivate for a long time, after all, it was very large and difficult to consume.

"No wonder it has attracted so many Supreme Domain Ancestors, if I get enough Star Soul Sand, it will definitely allow me to condense the Holy Soul!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, once we discover the Holy Soul Sand, we will work together to snatch it. A Star Soul Sand is born here almost every day, but it only appears for ten minutes, so it must be snatched within ten minutes, otherwise it will disappear!" the Xihe Domain Ancestor proposed.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Actually, he wanted to act alone, but this time it was the Xihe Domain Ancestor and the Qingyu Domain Ancestor who reminded him that he had come here, so it was naturally difficult to refuse to cooperate.

If he helped them snatch enough Star Soul Sand, he would then be promoted to act alone, so it would not be excessive.

Soon, the next day came.

At this time, in a place far away from Ye Tian and the others, a Star Soul Sand appeared.

Wu Xiu wanted to snatch this grain of Star Soul Sand, but unfortunately the distance was a bit far, but the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor of the Immortal Holy Gate was closer to this grain of Star Soul Sand.

"Hahaha, I'm the closest, no one can rob me!"

The Golden Snake Domain Ancestor said excitedly.

However, a figure appeared, and it was Ye Tian.

Ye Tian used the Space Saint Technique Void Escape, and the Spatial Skill of the Extreme Realm made Ye Tian's speed so fast that he arrived here in an instant.

At the same time, Ye Tian directly sealed the space between himself and the area of the Star Soul Sand with the Five Elements Seal, isolating the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor.

"Wow!"

The Star Soul Sand was put away by Ye Tian.
